title: notodanthonia auriculata
intro: Notodanthonia auriculata, also known as the eared sawgrass or the golden oat grass, is a plant species belonging to the family Poaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Notodanthonia auriculata are thought to include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and protecting against oxidative stress. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other topical applications.
